payload.answer: Rejected: normal users cannot execute admin SQL or delete memory cards via this command. No memories were created, updated, or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command attempt from a normal user, not a durable personal memory fact.

details: Detected admin SQL delete attempt: DELETE FROM memory_cards;
No authorization context indicates admin privileges.

repair_options: If you need a memory deleted, request deletion of a specific memory in natural language.
If you are an authorized administrator, use the proper authenticated admin interface rather than a normal user memory command.
